notice: Curated community module index. Entries marked _status: coming-soon are placeholders describing planned modules; their URLs are not yet hosted. Contribute via CONTRIBUTING.md.

modules.name: Strong's Concordance (Full)
modules.author: OpenScriptures
modules.description: Full ~14,400 Strong's entries covering all Hebrew (8,674) and Greek (5,624) original-language headwords. Drop-in replacement for the bundled Hebrew + Greek samples — same module envelope, vastly more depth.

modules.name: Treasury of Scripture Knowledge (Full)
modules.author: R. A. Torrey · public domain
modules.description: The complete TSK — approximately 340,000 cross-references across every verse of the canonical 66-book Bible. The reference standard for cross-reference study.

modules.name: Easton's Bible Dictionary (Full)
modules.author: M. G. Easton (1897)
modules.description: Complete ~4,000-entry Bible dictionary covering every named person, place, and concept in scripture. Replaces the bundled 30-entry sample.

modules.name: Jamieson-Fausset-Brown Commentary
modules.author: Jamieson, Fausset & Brown (1871)
modules.description: Verse-by-verse critical and explanatory commentary on the whole Bible. Concise, devotional, and broadly Reformed-evangelical in tone.

modules.name: Matthew Henry's Complete Commentary
modules.author: Matthew Henry (1710)
modules.description: The classic six-volume devotional commentary on the entire Bible. Warm, sermonic, endlessly quotable.

modules.name: Calvin's Commentaries
modules.author: John Calvin (16th c.)
modules.description: Calvin's commentaries on most of the Bible — rigorous, exegetical, foundational to the Reformed tradition.

modules.name: Spurgeon's Treasury of David
modules.author: Charles Spurgeon (1885)
modules.description: Spurgeon's monumental devotional + critical commentary on the Psalms, twenty years in the making.

modules.name: Holman Bible Atlas (Maps)
modules.author: Holman Reference
modules.description: Geo-referenced overlays of journey paths, kingdom borders, and city locations — Patriarchal era through the Pauline missions.

modules.name: ESV One-Year Reading Plan
modules.author: Crossway
modules.description: Crossway's classic four-track ESV daily reading plan — Psalms & Wisdom in the morning, Pentateuch + History; Prophets + Gospels in the evening.

modules.name: MacArthur Daily Bible Plan
modules.author: John MacArthur
modules.description: Daily readings drawn from OT, NT, Psalms, and Proverbs in proportion — finish the Bible in a year with built-in variety.

modules.name: Through the Bible in 90 Days
modules.author: Community
modules.description: Aggressive 90-day cover-to-cover plan — about 12 chapters a day. Best for a season of focused immersion.

modules.name: Daf Yomi (Full 7.5-year Cycle)
modules.author: Community (Sefaria index)
modules.description: Full 2,711-page Daf Yomi cycle through the Babylonian Talmud — one folio per day for ~7.5 years. Expands the bundled Daf Yomi sample to the entire cycle.

modules.name: Spanish UI Language Pack
modules.author: CODEX Community
modules.description: Complete Spanish (es-ES) translation of every CODEX UI string — menus, panels, tooltips, help articles. Auto-switches based on browser locale.

modules.name: German UI Language Pack
modules.author: CODEX Community
modules.description: Complete German (de-DE) translation of every CODEX UI string.

modules.name: Hebrew Interlinear (Leningradensis)
modules.author: OpenScriptures · Westminster
modules.description: Word-by-word Hebrew interlinear of the entire Tanakh, with Strong's numbers, lemma, and morphology tags. Powers literal mirror view.

modules.name: Greek Interlinear (NA28)
modules.author: SBL / Tyndale House
modules.description: Word-by-word Greek interlinear of the New Testament aligned to Nestle-Aland 28, with Strong's, parsing, and lemma data.

modules.name: Apocrypha Bundle (LXX)
modules.author: Brenton LXX
modules.description: Full text of the deuterocanonical books from Brenton's Septuagint — Tobit, Judith, Wisdom, Sirach, Baruch, 1–4 Maccabees, additions to Esther & Daniel.

modules.name: Nag Hammadi Library (English)
modules.author: Robinson translation
modules.description: Complete English translation of the 52 Coptic Gnostic tractates discovered at Nag Hammadi — Gospel of Thomas, Gospel of Philip, Apocryphon of John, and the rest.

modules.name: Book of Jubilees (English)
modules.author: R. H. Charles translation (1913)
modules.description: Charles' English translation of the Book of Jubilees ('Little Genesis') — a 2nd-century BC retelling of Genesis through early Exodus, canonical in the Ethiopian church.

modules.name: Dead Sea Scrolls (Highlights)
modules.author: Community · scholarly translations
modules.description: Curated highlights from the Qumran library — the Community Rule (1QS), War Scroll (1QM), Habakkuk Pesher (1QpHab), Temple Scroll excerpts, and the Great Isaiah Scroll variants.
